positive: Intricate stylized botanical pattern featuring glowing crescent moons, detailed forest silhouettes, and ornate geometric framing. Central composition, symmetrical repeating motif suitable for apparel print. Deep indigo and emerald green color palette with brilliant white and gold accents. Clean lines, strong contrast, deep shadows, high detail, engraved etching style mixed with modern vector art. Perfect for screen printing, seamless repeating pattern.
negative: blurry, noise, jpeg artifacts, amateur, text, watermark, logo, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poorly drawn, cropped, messy, distracting, ugly, photo, realistic, 3d render
